description: Indicates when childcare is available on this weekday. Both `start` and `end` must be provided together.

allOf.description: The time at which childcare becomes available on this weekday, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation). Must be earlier than `opens`.
The time at which childcare ends on this weekday, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation). Must be later than `closes`.
